problem id: ee3bbe87
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  00111000 -> 11100111
  10111111 -> 11101001
  00100010 -> 10001100
  00101101 -> 10110001
  01101000 -> 10101100
  00101100 -> 10110101
  11111010 -> 11110100
  00110101 -> 11010010
  10110100 -> 11000100

query: 00011100
predicted answer: 01110011
